description: System skill for People Analytics — workforce segmentation, attrition forecasting, engagement-survey distribution and analysis, predictive modeling on top of the HR stack.
System skill for Strategic Portfolio Management — portfolio composition, initiative lifecycle, demand intake, scenario evaluation, benefits tracking.
System skill for Strategic Workforce Planning — multi-year workforce plans, scenarios, headcount approvals, skills-gap analyses; triggers ATS recruiting on headcount approval.
System skill for Governance, Risk and Compliance — risk register, control assessments, policy attestations, compliance obligations and evidence, issue + remediation lifecycle.
System skill for Audit Management — audit plans, engagements, fieldwork findings, work papers, recommendations and report lifecycle; flows findings to GRC issues.
System skill for Data Catalog and Governance — data-asset inventory, classification, lineage, glossary, stewardship, certification, access policies, usage metrics.
System skill for Data Quality — quality rules, incidents, profile results, scorecards, SLA tracking; escalates SLA-critical breaches to ITSM.
System skill for Master Data Management — match/merge/survivorship rules; resolves customer / supplier / employee golden records; publishes to downstream consumers.
System skill for ESG Management — emissions records, targets, metrics rollups, disclosure packages, supplier ESG assessments, sustainability initiatives.
System skill for Contact Center as a Service — contact records, support sessions, queue stats; voice / SMS via telephony; call transcription + sentiment via compute.
System skill for Electronic Signature: envelope lifecycle (create/send/void); signing action via external e-signature side_effect.
System skill for Payroll Management — pay run, pay slip, payroll journal, tax filing workflow; payments executed externally; pay-slip distribution via email.
System skill for Source-to-Pay — sourcing event, requisition, PO, goods receipt, invoice workflow; supplier comms via email; contract signing via e-signature.
System skill for Agency Management Software — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for AIOps — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Accounts Payable Automation — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for API Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.

System skill for Digital Asset Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for the DATA-AI-PLAT Semantic Layer, Governance, and Data Products module. Runtime workflows over governed semantic metrics, data products, ontologies, and knowledge graph entities.
System skill for Data Center Infrastructure Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Digital Experience Monitoring — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.

System skill for Enterprise Content Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Employee Experience and Engagement — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.

System skill for the Expense Capture and Reporting module. Runs agent workflows over expense reports, expense lines, and expense policies: querying report and line state, checking lines against active policy, and notifying submitters and approvers as reports move through the approval lifecycle.
System skill for Fleet Maintenance Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Fleet Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Hardware Asset Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.

System skill for Knowledge Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.

System skill for Manufacturing Connected Operations — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.

System skill for Public-Sector Licensing and Permitting — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Retail Store Operations — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Remote Monitoring and Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Robotic Process Automation — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Subscription and Revenue Lifecycle Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Supplier Lifecycle Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Telecommunications OSS/BSS — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.
System skill for Test Management — runtime workflows over the domain's master data, derived from masters + cross-domain handoffs.

Joiner-Mover-Leaver process skill — orchestrates the employee lifecycle across HCM, IGA, ONBOARDING, PAYROLL, ITAM, BEN-ADMIN, COMP-MGMT, TALENT-MGMT, WFM, ATS, ITSM, AGENCY-MGMT. APQC PCF L2 20599 'Manage employee onboarding, training, and development'. Triggered by employee.{created,promoted,position_changed,terminated} fan-out.

Lead-to-Cash process skill — orchestrates opportunity lifecycle across CRM, SALES-ENG, CDP, CPQ, CSM, PSA, REV-INTEL, SALES-PERF, AGENCY-MGMT, WORK-MGMT. APQC PCF L3 10182 'Manage leads/opportunities'. Triggered by opportunity.{created,qualified,requires_quote,stage_changed,closed_won,closed_lost}.

Customer/HR case orchestration process skill — routes cases across CDP, CRM, CSM, HRSD, IGA, ITSM, SUB-MGMT with cross-domain escalation + churn-risk + sentiment loops. APQC PCF L3 10388 'Manage customer service problems, requests, and inquiries'. Triggered by case.{created,it_assistance_required,critical_health_drop,churn_risk_detected,resolved}.

Per-module system skill for the Candidate CRM backbone of ATS. Masters candidates, recruitment sources, agencies, and events. Folds AI-RECRUIT (resume parsing, ML matching) as optional augmentations — the workflow proceeds with manual entry.
Per-module system skill for curated candidate groupings (nurture pools, pipeline-building). Embedded-masters candidates as a consumer read.
Per-module system skill for employee-driven candidate sourcing (referral records, bonus eligibility, status workflow). Embedded-masters candidates as a consumer read.
Per-module system skill for the requisitions → postings → applications pipeline. Realizes REQ-MGMT and the application-flow slice of CANDIDATE-EXP. Embedded-masters candidates.
Per-module system skill for interview scheduling, panel coordination, and scorecards. Realizes the `interviewing` lifecycle state on job_applications.

Per-module system skill for offer drafting, approval, extension, signature, and acceptance. Realizes the `offer_extended` lifecycle state. Requires `sign_document` for letter signing — drops coverage to ~83%.

Per-module system skill for pre-employment background-check orchestration with adverse-action workflow. Requires `send_email` for adverse-action notices — drops coverage to ~75%. Flagged in §10 capability-layer audit as a domain_module_capabilities gap.

Per-module system skill for the post-acceptance / pre-start-date window — paperwork in flight, background check pending, pre-boarding. Realizes the `hired` lifecycle state on job_applications. Publishes pre_employee.activated to hand the canonical reconciliation to HCM.

System skill for the SMP Discovery and Optimization module. Surfaces SaaS app inventory, shadow IT, usage telemetry, and license rightsizing; gates sanction, deprovisioning, reclamation, and shadow-app promotion / block decisions.
System skill for the SMP Renewal and Vendor Management module. Surfaces upcoming renewals, vendor positions, and contract terms; gates renewal initiation, execution, and cancellation.

System skill for the Performance and Goal Management module. Operates the review cycle, goal-setting and OKR workflows, and calibration sessions over the module's mastered data (performance_reviews, performance_goals, okr_objectives, talent_calibrations).

System skill for the Succession and Career Planning module. Operates succession plans, 9-box placement, and career aspiration / development workflows over the module's mastered data (succession_plans, nine_box_placements, career_aspirations).
System skill for the Continuous Feedback and Recognition module. Operates feedback authoring, sharing, and acknowledgement workflows over the module's mastered data (feedback_records).

Per-module system skill for Incident Management — log, triage, route, and resolve service incidents. Required CI lookup for impact analysis; required outbound for assignment + status notifications; optional knowledge / SLA lookup and AI augmentation.

Per-module system skill for Service Request Fulfillment — catalog browse, request submission, approval, fulfillment. Outbound email required for fulfillment status updates; KB + SLA + AI text drafting optional.
Per-module system skill for Problem Management — root-cause analysis, known-error tracking. Required CI lookup; optional AI clustering for root-cause grouping.

Per-module system skill for Change and Release Management — change submission, CAB approval, scheduling, implementation. CI lookup required for impact; outbound email + chat required for CAB notifications; SLA lookup optional.

Per-module system skill for Event and Alert Handling — monitoring alert ingestion, deduplication, correlation, escalation. NOTE: monitoring_alerts CRUD tools aren't loaded yet — this skill is intentionally thin until that gap is filled. Outbound email + chat required for paging; CI lookup + AI classification optional.
Per-module system skill for Knowledge Management — article authoring, review, publication, retirement. Optional AI text generation for authoring assistance.

Per-module system skill for Agent Workspace and Reporting — unified agent view, walk-up routing, virtual-agent surface, reporting. NOTE: workspace-view / virtual-agent CRUD tools aren't loaded yet — this skill is intentionally thin until that gap is filled. Only optional AI text generation + classification today.

Per-module system skill for SLA and Chargeback Management — SLA definition, breach evaluation, chargeback rollup. NOTE: SLA evaluation + chargeback CRUD tools beyond query_slas aren't loaded yet — this skill is intentionally thin until that gap is filled.

Per-module system skill for the cross-asset reference-data and reconciliation substrate. No own masters; reads from HAM / SAM / SMP feeds and runs normalization + identity-reconciliation compute primitives. EAM feed optional.

Per-module system skill for cross-asset contract management. Masters asset_contracts. Required PO + SaaS-app reads for contract-coverage discovery; required outbound email + e-signature for activation and renewal notifications. Hardware / software CRUD reads optional (depend on which asset class the contract covers).

Per-module system skill for the unified asset lifecycle event log. Masters asset_lifecycle_events. Required HAM / SAM / SMP / locations / org_units / PO reads to resolve event subjects and movements. HAM disposal chain and EAM events optional; outbound assignment-notification email optional.

Per-module system skill for portfolio-level TCO and lifecycle reporting. Derived module: no own masters; consumes from every sub-domain. Required HAM / SAM / SMP / contracts / lifecycle-events reads + TCO + portfolio-metrics compute primitives. EAM reads + disposal visibility optional.
System skill for LMS-COURSE-DELIVERY: course authoring, content delivery, enrollment lifecycle, and transcript posting. Masters courses, course_enrollments, learning_records.
System skill for LMS-COMPLIANCE-TRAINING: mandatory regulatory training assignment, tracking, certification, and evidence retention. Masters compliance_assignments, learner_certifications.
System skill for LMS-SKILLS: skill profiles, competency tracking, and learning-path recommendation. Masters skill_profiles, learning_paths.

System skill for the APM-PORTFOLIO-REGISTRY module: maintains the application portfolio inventory, technology platform registry, application interface map, and business capability map. Drives lifecycle transitions on enterprise_applications, technology_platforms, application_interfaces and business_capability_maps.

System skill for the APM-RATIONALIZATION module: scores applications on TIME quadrants, captures application TCO snapshots, runs technology fit assessments with architect-of-record sign-off, and feeds portfolio rationalization decisions back to the registry.

Per-module system skill for Account and Contact Management — create, read, and edit accounts and contacts; surface subscription, invoice, segment, attribute, and case context; notify owners on account changes.
Per-module system skill for Lead Capture and Qualification — capture leads, score and qualify them, convert to account/contact/opportunity; outbound lead-nurture email.
Per-module system skill for Opportunity and Pipeline Management — opportunity CRUD, stage transitions, won/lost closure, deal-risk escalation; pulls conversation-intelligence signals.
Per-module system skill for Sales Activity and Task Management — log calls, emails, meetings; outbound email, calendar scheduling, meeting reminders; optional call-recording / transcript surfacing.

Per-module system skill for the AI Sales Copilot — reads across the full CRM surface (accounts, contacts, leads, opportunities, stages, activities) and applies copilot-suggested edits; LLM-driven drafting and outbound comms.
System agent for the CMDB Core Repository. Queries CI, relationship, and class state; updates CIs after reconciliation; raises ITSM incidents when an unauthorized change is detected.
System agent for the Service Mapping module. Queries service maps and the CI graph that backs them to answer business-service impact and topology questions.
System agent for the Baselines and Drift Detection module. Queries baselines and current CI state to answer drift questions; surfaces diff against captured baseline.
Agent for the SEM-STRATEGY-DEFINITION module: authoring strategic objectives, strategy maps, and cascading goal hierarchies.
Agent for the SEM-EXECUTION-TRACKING module: managing strategic initiatives, traceability, and investment alignment views.
Agent for the SEM-OPERATING-RHYTHM module: orchestrating QBR/MBR/WBR cadences and recording strategy decisions.

System skill for the HCM-CORE-WORKER module. Operates on employees, employment_contracts, and employment_events: queries the core worker record, posts employment events (hire / promote / transfer / leave / terminate), handles contract signing.

System skill for the HCM-ORG-POSITIONS module. Operates on org_units, job_profiles, and hcm_positions: maintains org structure, opens / fills / freezes / eliminates positions, manages job profile catalog.

System skill for the HCM-LIFECYCLE-WORKFLOWS module. Orchestrates joiner-mover-leaver workflows across HCM: ingests hire signals from ATS (offers + assessments + pre-employees + candidates), creates the employee + employment_event records, fans out termination cascades, writes asset_lifecycle_events into ITAM.
System skill for CSM-ENTITLEMENTS: provisions, tracks, and ages out customer entitlements; reads subscription and contract context to bind eligibility and SLA targets.
System skill for CSM-KNOWLEDGE: authors and updates customer-facing knowledge articles, informed by support case patterns.
Agent surface for the WSC channels-and-conversations module: read/write messages, channels, threads, members, attachments, and in-channel file shares; archive channels via the workflow gate.
Agent surface for voice and video huddles: schedule, start, end huddles; query existing huddles for a channel or user.
Agent surface for external guest collaboration: invite guests, revoke access on offboarding (workflow gate), query outstanding invitations.
Agent for Plan Design and Enrollment Setup: maintain benefit plan catalog, configure enrollment windows, attach carriers, map deduction codes.
Agent for Enrollment and Life Events: process elections, manage dependents, handle life-event-driven enrollment changes.
Agent for Carrier Connectivity: manage carrier relationships, generate and transmit eligibility feeds, reconcile carrier acknowledgements.
Agent for ACA Compliance Reporting: generate 1094-C/1095-C forms, perform affordability calculations, file annual returns.

Agent skill for HRSD-CASE-MGMT: triage inbound HR cases, route to the right owner, draft responses against the knowledge base, and progress the lifecycle. Reads from employees, knowledge_articles, and the inbound payload data_objects (policy attestations, garnishments, compliance assignments, etc.); writes hr_cases and case_categories.

Agent skill for HRSD-EMPLOYEE-PORTAL: greet employees, surface relevant catalog items and knowledge articles, capture intake details, and submit an HR case on the employee's behalf. Hands off to hrsd_case_mgmt_agent.
Agent skill for HRSD-KNOWLEDGE: surface HR knowledge for search and case-resolution suggestions; draft new articles or updates when a case closure indicates an authoring gap.
Agent for Project Delivery: scopes engagements, structures projects and tasks, manages SLAs and milestones, drives delivery from staffing request through customer-accepted completion.

Agent for Resource Management: maintains the resource pool and skill inventory, matches demand to supply, manages assignments and forward-looking allocations, watches utilisation and detects conflicts.
Agent for Time and Expense reconciliation: routes project-tagged time entries and expense reports from WFM and EXPENSE into PSA for billing rollup, cost posting and utilisation analytics.
Agent for Project Financials: manages billing rate cards, contractual milestones, customer-invoice triggering, ASC 606 revenue recognition, and the AR feedback loop from ERP-FIN.
System agent for the CSA Subscriptions and Member Portal module.
System agent for the Online Farm Store and Pickup module.
System agent for the DTC Delivery Routing module.
System agent for the Farmers Market POS module.
System agent for the Wholesale and Food Hub Orders module.
System agent for the Butcher and Whole-Animal Pre-Sales module.
System agent for the Harvest Forecasting module.
Per-module system skill for template-driven contract authoring and clause-library management. Masters contract_templates and contract_clauses; produces draft legal_contracts.

Per-module system skill for redlining, counterparty exchange, and clause-risk detection. Consumes legal_contracts and contract_clauses; gates the in_negotiation -> approved transition. AI augmentations (risk detection, redline generation) drop coverage below 100%.
Per-module system skill for the executed-contract repository. Masters legal_contracts and signature_records. Requires sign_document for envelope completion (external) — drops coverage below 100%.
Per-module system skill for the obligations register. Masters contract_obligations; uses notify_person for due-date alerts (platform-covered).
Per-module system skill for renewal alerting and execution. Consumes legal_contracts and contract_templates; uses notify_person for renewal warnings (platform-covered).

Agent for the PM-DISCOVERY module. Captures customer feedback and feature ideas, classifies and clusters them, links feedback to candidate features, and shepherds feature_requests through triage and prioritization. Notifies product managers when upvote or signal thresholds cross.

Agent for the PM-ROADMAP-DELIVERY module. Authors and publishes product roadmaps, plans and ships releases, runs beta programs, and records product metrics against strategy and OKRs. Broadcasts release announcements internally.
Orchestrates onboarding journeys: instantiates plans, advances stages and tasks, dispatches notifications, and coordinates handoffs to ITSM, IGA, IWMS, PAYROLL, LMS, HRSD, EMP-EXP.
Collects, validates, and approves new-hire documents (I-9, tax forms, direct deposit, NDA); signals HCM and Payroll on completion.
Drives pre-board communications, day-one welcome cadences, buddy pairing, and cohort intro-meeting coordination.

Agent capable of authoring, enriching, classifying, and gating PIM product content. Reads engineering parts and compliance declarations from PLM; reads supplier data from S2P. Drives the draft -> review -> approve workflow on pim_products and the translation lifecycle on pim_translations.
Agent for managing digital assets attached to PIM products: upload, classify, approve, and publish. Handles rights review queue, brand-compliance checks, and CDN-distribution orchestration.

Agent for publishing PIM products to syndication channels (marketplaces, merchant feeds, commerce platforms, retailer feeds, GDSN datapools). Owns the syndication-job state machine, validates against destination schemas, and surfaces rejected-listing remediation work.
Operates the matter lifecycle: intake-to-active-to-closed, parties, key dates, matter-scoped documents. Owns the central record every other legal-practice module attaches to.
Runs client intake: conflict-of-interest checks, engagement-letter drafting and e-signature, retainer collection, and intake-to-matter conversion.
Captures time entries against ABA UTBMS codes, assembles prebills, processes partner review, issues invoices, and posts AR. Wires to LEDES e-bill export.
Manages IOLTA trust accounts: deposits, disbursements, three-way reconciliation, exception detection, and state-bar reporting.
Captures court filings, applies jurisdiction-specific deadline rules, alerts on statute-of-limitations and key dates, and integrates with ECF systems.

System skill for the WORK-MGMT-TASK-EXEC module. Operates on work_items, work_projects, and work_automations: queries the work substrate, creates and updates items and projects, manages automation rule state, surfaces blockers and overdue work.

System skill for the WORK-MGMT-GOALS-OKR module. Operates on okr_objectives with work_items as the KR-linking substrate: queries OKRs and their progress, creates and updates objectives across the team-execution lifecycle, surfaces stalled or under-scored objectives.

Per-module system skill for the agent-facing real estate workflow. Covers lead capture and CRM contributor writes, listing creation and MLS syndication, tour scheduling and execution, transaction management end-to-end (offer to close), and disclosure handling. Optional augmentations: ML-based buyer-preference matching and AI listing-description generation.

Per-module system skill for broker-level oversight. Masters commission splits with franchise overrides and per-agent caps; contributes compliance-review fields on transactions and disclosures. Optional augmentations: broadcast notifications to the broker compliance team and AI-generated compliance summaries.

Solo-agent system skill for the REAL-ESTATE-AGENT starter. Spans CRM lead/contact workflow, RE-BROKERAGE listing/tour/transaction/disclosure workflow, and CLM contract reference. Calls platform CRUD on every embedded master; uses notify_person for client comms, sign_document for purchase agreements, syndicate_to_mls for listing distribution. Optional augmentations: ML buyer-preference matching, AI listing-description and follow-up-email generation, broker-side contract authoring and execution overrides.
Agent for the joiner/mover/ad-hoc access-request workflow: receive request, run SoD pre-check, route approval, hand off to provisioning, notify requester on completion.
Agent for periodic and ad-hoc access-certification campaigns: assemble line items, route to reviewers, capture decisions, queue revocations, close out with GRC evidence.
Agent for SoD detection + triage + mitigation workflow: evaluate toxic combinations against rule + ML output, triage with severity, drive mitigation, track accepted risk.
Agent for the entitlement catalog: author, publish, deprecate, retire access primitives; surface them to access requests and SoD ruleset.
Agent for the connector framework: pick up queued provisioning events, execute against downstream systems via SCIM/REST/proprietary connectors, record completion or failure.

Agent surface for the Hiring Starter: query and create candidates, post jobs, route applications through screening and interviews, schedule and update interviews, capture interview scorecards, draft and send job offers. Inherits lifecycle and workflow gates from the canonical ATS masters; the starter itself authors no lifecycle states.

Operates the field-service dispatch workflow: receives service requests, creates work orders, assigns technicians via dispatch records, generates field visits, optimizes routes, and closes the loop on completion. Lives where the dispatcher and field technicians both work.

Manages the installed-equipment asset register and its preventive maintenance cadence. Tracks equipment from pending install through decommission, generates due / overdue PM events, and handles customer-site setup.
Manages recurring service agreements covering customer equipment. Drafts, activates, renews, and terminates contracts; communicates SLA entitlement signals to dispatch ops.
Agent capability for managing the library catalog: bibliographic records, library items, authority control, and holdings.
Agent capability for daily circulation: check-out, check-in, holds, renewals, and fines.
Agent capability for patron registration, profile maintenance, and account administration.
Agent capability for collection development: ordering, receiving, serials, and e-resource licensing.
Agent capability for the public discovery interface: search, browse, saved searches, and hold-placement.
Agent capability for interlibrary loan: borrowing and lending workflow, partner routing.

System skill for the HVAC-SVC-MGMT starter. Single agent covering the full HVAC service workflow: customer + site + equipment intake; PM scheduling; quote-to-work-order conversion; dispatch and field execution; contract drafting; invoicing. Calls platform CRUD on every embedded master; uses notify_person for customer appointment confirmations and PM reminders. No workflow-gate tools (starter ships only baseline permissions per Rule #19 invariant 4); the underlying FSM full modules carry the gates.

Agent skill for the CSA Starter Kit: read and mutate CSA memberships, share packs, pickup locations, and customer-shell records; send pickup-reminder / billing notifications; charge subscription payments.
Agent for instructor-led and virtual-instructor-led training delivery: offerings, sessions, instructor assignments, attendance capture, waitlist management.
Agent for certification and badge management: catalog definitions, certificate issuance, badge awards, CEU and FINRA CE record management.
Agent for learner data privacy: GDPR consent capture, subject access requests, and right-to-erasure processing.
Agent for learning automation: dynamic audiences, automated enrollment rules, notification templates, learner notifications, manager nudges, and escalation policies.

Lite agent for the Training Records starter: query compliance assignments, training evidence, and certifications; ingest external training-vendor completions via webhook; notify employees and managers about evidence requests and expirations.
Agent skill for the WORK-MGMT-INTAKE module. Reads work_forms and work_form_submissions; can author new forms, ingest submissions, and convert to work_items in the target project.
System agent for SMP-OPTIMIZATION: utilization analysis, idle-license reclamation, optimization recommendations, app benchmarking.
System agent for SMP-AUTOMATION: automation workflow execution, employee-facing app-request fulfillment routing through approval and IGA provisioning.
Maintains the skill ontology and competency models for SKILLS-MGMT-TAXONOMY: authors skill_taxonomies, individual skills, and competency_models; runs publish/archive workflow gates.
Maintains per-worker skill profiles for SKILLS-MGMT-PROFILE: runs inference, captures assessments and endorsements, validates profiles, computes skill-gap analyses against competency models.

Operates the internal talent marketplace for TLNT-INTEL-MARKETPLACE: posts opportunities (gigs, projects, full-time, mentorships), routes applications through the review/accept/reject workflow, matches mentor-mentee engagements.

AI mobility, succession, and fit-scoring engine for TLNT-INTEL-MOBILITY: computes fit scores, generates mobility recommendations, ranks succession candidates, projects career paths, runs match inference batches.
Workforce-skills insights agent for TLNT-INTEL-INSIGHTS: produces org-level heatmaps of skill supply, demand, gaps, and risk for HR leaders.
Transcribes and analyzes sales conversations: extracts topics, action items, and market signals from the call corpus.
Scores opportunity risk, raises and clears deal warnings, and drives the manager pipeline-inspection surface.
Produces revenue forecasts, runs the rep submission cycle, and tracks forecast accuracy.
Runs coaching sessions over recorded calls: scorecards, review comments, and playbook compliance.
Auto-captures activities, attributes them to opportunities, and rolls up engagement scores.

Per-module system skill for the catalog and merchandising backbone of Digital Commerce. Masters products, storefronts, and coupons; covers product authoring, catalog publication, storefront configuration, and promotion setup.

Per-module system skill for the order-capture spine of Digital Commerce: cart, checkout, order, order line, and payment workflows. Reads the shared customer and subscription masters; payment capture is executed via an external gateway.
Per-module system skill for the fulfillment and shipping slice of Digital Commerce. Masters fulfillments and shipments; covers pick/pack/ship orchestration and carrier shipment creation.
System skill for the BPA Process Repository and Publishing module. Authors, revises, and publishes business process models over the module's master data and publish lifecycle.
System skill for the BPA Capability Mapping and Reference Frameworks module. Authors, revises, and publishes business capability maps over the module's embedded-master data.
System skill for the BPA Value Stream Modeling and Simulation module. Models value streams and runs process simulations over the module's master data.

System skill for the Engagement and Service-Line Workflow module. Operates over client_engagements: queries the engagement book of work, advances engagement lifecycle state, and notifies engagement stakeholders.

System skill for the Tax Return Preparation and Document Retention module. Operates over tax_returns: queries returns, advances preparation and filing state, sends returns for e-signature, polls the taxing authority for acceptance status, and receives acceptance and signature callbacks.
System skill for the Client Portal and Time and Billing module. Queries time entries that feed engagement billing and notifies clients through the portal.

Agent surface for the CDP Ingestion and Identity Resolution module. Ingests behavioral, transactional, and identifier signals from sources and resolves disparate identifiers into a unified entity graph.

Agent surface for the CDP Unified Profile, Attributes, and Predictive Scoring module. Maintains the resolved golden-record profile, computed attributes, and the predictive scoring layer that downstream segments and personalization read from.

Agent surface for the CDP Segmentation and Downstream Activation module. Authors static and dynamic audiences over profile attributes and behavioral events, then activates them to ad platforms, marketing tools, CRM, and ad-server destinations.

Agent surface for the CDP Observed Journeys and Customer 360 module. Reconciles observed multi-channel journey progression into a single queryable customer view across transactional, marketing, and operational systems.
System skill for the DATA-AI-PLAT Lakehouse and Pipeline Engineering module. Runtime workflows over lakehouse tables and data pipelines.
System skill for the DATA-AI-PLAT Machine Learning Lifecycle module. Runtime workflows over ML models and feature sets.
System skill for the DATA-AI-PLAT LLM Orchestration and AI Agents module. Runtime workflows over registered AI agents.
Agent surface for the Dairy Herd and Animal Lifecycle module. Manages the cow population through breeding, lactation, and health events, including culling decisions and lactation-cycle closure.
Agent surface for the Parlor and Milking Operations module. Records milking sessions and aggregates milk into bulk-tank lots dispatched as shipments to processors.
Agent surface for the Milk Quality Testing module. Records milk-quality test results and pulls external lab test results to gate shipment on quality thresholds.
Agent surface for the Feed Rationing and TMR module. Maintains feed rations and ration formulations consumed across the herd.
Agent surface for the DLP Policy and Classification Control module: authors and maintains DLP policies, reviews and approves policy exceptions, and references data classifications.
Agent surface for the DLP Egress Enforcement and Incident Response module: triages DLP incidents and exfiltration attempts, manages quarantine release, and reviews user activity.
System agent for the DXP authoring and multi-site module: queries and authors web pages, content components, and digital experiences, drives the publish lifecycle, and refreshes delivery caches.

System agent for the DXP experience personalization and experimentation module: queries and manages personalization rules, A/B tests, and segments, and drives their activation, start, and publish gates.

System agent for the DXP portal and journey orchestration module: queries and authors journey steps, reads the digital experiences they compose, and reacts to inbound segment updates from the customer data platform.

System skill for the DSPM discovery and classification module. Enumerates cloud data stores, classifies the sensitivity of the data they hold, traces lineage, and triages shadow or unmanaged data findings.

System skill for the DSPM access and risk module. Audits identity permissions on data stores, flags over-privilege and toxic combinations, and recomputes per-asset risk scores to prioritize remediation.
System skill for the DSPM incident and remediation module. Triages detected sensitive-data incidents through investigation and containment and drives policy enforcement to resolution.

System skill for the Commercial Leasing Pipeline module. Runs workflows over commercial leases, tenant credit records, and sublease transactions, reading the investment property each lease attaches to and notifying the parties through lease execution.

System skill for the CAM Reconciliation and Rent Escalations module. Runs workflows over common-area-maintenance charges and recurring-billing escalations, distributing reconciliation statements to tenants.

System skill for the Space Inventory and Market Intelligence module. Runs workflows over stacking plans and building certifications, and notifies stakeholders of certification status and tenant-relations events.

System skill for the vehicle work order module. Opens work orders from inspection defects, telematics faults, and driver reports, composes labor and parts task lines, assigns mechanics and shops, triages maintenance defects, and drives each repair through completion sign-off.

System skill for the preventive maintenance scheduling module. Defines and queries PM schedules per vehicle class, evaluates mileage, engine-hour, calendar, and fault-code triggers, and generates work orders ahead of due dates while tracking deferred maintenance.

System skill for the parts inventory and warranty module. Queries parts stock and reorder thresholds, records parts consumption against work orders, identifies OEM-warranty-eligible repairs per vehicle, and tracks recall coverage and completion across the fleet.
System skill for the Infrastructure Monitoring and Event Management module. Runs monitoring-policy authoring, event and alert triage, and incident escalation over the module's master data.
System skill for the Capacity Planning module. Collects capacity datapoints, maintains baselines and forecasts, and escalates threshold and forecast-exhaustion signals.
System skill for the Operations Automation and Workload Scheduling module. Reads alerts that trigger automation and drives alert resolution as runbooks and scheduled jobs complete.

System agent for the ERP-FIN General Ledger and Close module. Posts and reverses journal entries, maintains the chart of accounts, cost centers, and legal entities, opens and closes accounting periods, and matches intercompany transactions across entities.
System agent for the ERP-FIN Fixed Asset Accounting module. Capitalizes and disposes fixed assets, runs depreciation against asset schedules, and keeps the asset ledger tied to the general ledger.
System agent for the ERP-FIN Cash and Banking module. Records cash transactions, manages bank accounts, and reconciles bank statements against the ledger.
System agent for the ERP-FIN Revenue Recognition module. Recognizes and reverses revenue against recognition records in line with current accounting standards.

System skill for the Planning and Budgeting module: reads and updates financial plans and approved budgets, supports driver-based planning and the headcount-spend slice of the plan, and drafts plan and budget narrative.
System skill for the Forecasting and Scenario Modeling module: reads and refreshes rolling forecasts, reads what-if scenario models, and drafts forecast and scenario narrative.

System skill for the Variance and Management Reporting module: reads variance analyses and period actuals from journal entries, and drafts root-cause variance commentary and management reporting narrative.

Per-module system skill for RE-INVEST Fund Accounting. Masters investment_funds and asset_management_fees; embeds capital_calls and fund_distributions. Runs capital-call issuance, distribution declaration, and fee accrual workflows, notifying limited partners of capital calls and distributions.

Per-module system skill for RE-INVEST Investor Reporting and Portal. Masters limited_partners; embeds capital_calls and fund_distributions; consumes rental_leases and commercial_leases. Issues investor statements and portal updates, notifying limited partners of statements, capital calls, and distributions.

Per-module system skill for RE-INVEST Portfolio Valuation and Underwriting. Masters investment_properties and property_valuations. Runs valuation refresh and underwriting workflows over the property portfolio.
Per-module system skill for agent and endpoint management: deploys and removes monitoring agents, tracks their liveness and configuration, and surfaces discovered endpoints.
Per-module system skill for endpoint monitoring and alerting: evaluates telemetry against monitoring policies, raises and triages alerts, and routes notifications.
Per-module system skill for patch management: schedules, executes, and rolls back patch jobs across managed endpoints within maintenance windows.
Per-module system skill for remote scripting and automation: authors, approves, and executes automation scripts against managed endpoints.

System skill for the Corporate Card Reconciliation module. Runs agent workflows over corporate cards and card transactions: querying card and transaction state, supporting the match of posted transactions to expense lines, and notifying cardholders and reconcilers during reconciliation.

System skill for the Travel Booking and Per Diem module. Runs agent workflows over travel bookings: querying booking and itinerary state and notifying travelers and approvers as bookings are reserved, confirmed, and completed.

Per-module system skill for fleet tracking and telemetry. Operates over the module's masters (vehicle trips, GPS waypoints, idle events, geofence events) to answer where vehicles are, how they move, and how the fleet utilizes time and routes.

Per-module system skill for compliance and driver safety. Operates over the module's masters (ELD hours-of-service logs, dashcam events, driver behavior events, driver safety scorecards) to keep drivers compliant, surface risky events, and track coaching and safety scoring.

System skill for the Remote Session Control module. Runs live remote-control session workflows over the remote_sessions master, reading RMM agent liveness and the linked service incident, and notifies the relevant person on session events.
System skill for the Session Recording and Audit module. Runs recording and audit workflows over the session_recordings master, and notifies the relevant person on recording and retention events.
System skill for the Residential Leasing and Screening module: manage applications, screening, leases, and tenancy lifecycle.
System skill for the Unit Inventory and Maintenance module: manage rental-unit availability and the maintenance-request lifecycle.
System skill for the Rent Collection and Property Accounting module: bill and collect rent, track delinquency, and reconcile property accounting.
System skill for the KGP Ontology Engine module: authors, validates, and publishes ontologies on the native graph store, and reads the cross-domain ontology surface.
System skill for the KGP Graph Query and Applications module: queries and reconciles knowledge graph entities for federated queries, agent grounding, and operational apps.
Manages the property and lease portfolio: queries properties, leases, and floor plans, runs the lease lifecycle, and dispatches lease and property notifications.
Optimizes workplace space: queries spaces and occupancy records, runs the space allocation lifecycle, and notifies occupants and planners.
Runs facility maintenance and utility tracking: queries work orders and meter readings, drives the work-order and reading lifecycles, and dispatches maintenance notifications.
Manages capital projects: queries projects, runs the capital-project approval and delivery lifecycle, and notifies project stakeholders.
Operates device enrollment and lifecycle: onboards devices, issues and revokes enrollment tokens, retires or flags lost or stolen devices, and records deployment results.
Delivers configuration and applications: publishes and assigns configuration profiles, publishes and deprecates mobile app packages, and assigns and deploys apps to devices.
Manages compliance posture: publishes and revokes compliance policies, evaluates devices against them, and routes non-compliance to incident and access workflows.
System skill for the Corporate Cards and Authorization Controls module: runtime workflows over corporate card accounts and card authorizations, including authorization decisioning and reconciliation.
System skill for the Vendor Bill Pay module: runtime workflows over vendor payment authorizations, routing, and release.
System skill for the Pre-Spend Approval and Policy module: runtime workflows over spend requests and spend policies, including policy evaluation and approval routing.

System skill for the Software Catalog and Installation Discovery module: maintains the normalized software product catalog, ingests discovered installation signals from inventory sources, and reconciles installed software against the catalog.

System skill for the Entitlement Reconciliation and Renewal module: reconciles deployments and usage against purchased entitlements, manages renewal and true-up windows, and drives reclamation of unused licenses.

System skill for the Audit Defense and Compliance Reporting module: gathers deployment and usage evidence, assembles audit response packages, and submits counsel-reviewed responses to publisher audit demands.
Authors and sends marketing campaigns and emails: queries and creates campaigns, composes and sends email, and runs A/B variant tests.
Orchestrates cross-channel nurture journeys: queries journeys and drives the journey lifecycle across email, push, in-app, and SMS steps.
Scores and nurtures leads: queries lead scores, computes behavioral and demographic scores, and triggers nurture on score thresholds.
Captures leads through hosted landing pages and forms: queries forms and records submissions with progressive profiling.
Authors, certifies, and deprecates metric definitions, and publishes dimensional models, for the Metric and Dimensional Definitions module.
Schedules and runs materializations, captures query lineage, and analyzes query cost for the Federation, Caching, and Lineage module.
Manages metric access policies and serves metric queries over SQL and REST for the Multi-Protocol Delivery and Access module.
System skill for the HCMS Content Modeling and Environments module: manages content types, fields, validation, and isolated content environments.
System skill for the HCMS Content Authoring and Localization module: authors content entries, runs editorial review and scheduling, and manages locales.
System skill for the HCMS Content Delivery and Integration module: coordinates content releases and delivery to downstream channels.

System skill for the NCDB Schema Builder module: model no-code bases and record definitions, query and evolve the schema, and create the linked-record tables downstream views, forms, and automations bind to.
System skill for the NCDB Views and Forms module: build and share grid, gallery, kanban, calendar, and timeline views, and create and publish forms that write structured submissions into a table.
System skill for the NCDB Automation and Sync module: author record-triggered and scheduled automations, run them, and dispatch outbound API calls and notifications to external systems.
System skill for the Social Publishing and Planning module: draft, schedule, approve, and publish social posts across connected accounts, with AI assistance for copy and imagery.
System skill for the Social Engagement Inbox module: triage and respond to inbound social messages with account context and sentiment scoring.
System skill for the Social Listening and Monitoring module: track listening topics, surface brand mentions, score sentiment, and respond to mentions.
System skill for the Influencer and Creator Programs module: manage creator relationships from outreach through active partnership.

System skill for the Worker Sourcing and Supplier Management module. Operates over staffing suppliers, rate cards, staffing work orders, and contingent workers: queries each master, drives the supplier-activation, rate-card publish/supersede, and worker tenure lifecycles, and signs statements of work.

System skill for the Contingent Time and Invoicing module. Operates over contingent timesheets and contingent invoices: queries each master, drives timesheet submit-approve-bill and invoice receive-match-pay lifecycles, and notifies suppliers and approvers.
System skill for the Traceability Events and Lot Genealogy module: query and write critical tracking events, key data elements, and lot genealogy, and answer traceback requests.
System skill for the Recall Execution module: initiate and drive recalls, identify affected lots from genealogy, notify consignees, and track closure.
System skill for the Supplier Documents and Provenance module: manage supplier certifications, track expiry and renewal, and verify provenance claims.
System agent for the LCAP Visual Composition and Data Modeling module: authors and publishes low-code apps, pages, business objects, and data source bindings.
System agent for the LCAP Runtime and Application Lifecycle module: manages low-code workflow definitions through their publish, deprecate, and retire lifecycle.

System skill for the Content Audit and Inventory module. Schedules and runs content audits, classifies and retires inventory records, and ingests crawler completion signals over the web content estate.

System skill for the Editorial Workflow and Planning module. Manages content lifecycle plans through draft, active, review-due, revised, and retired states, reading the inventory it governs and notifying content owners of review cadence.

System skill for the Content Quality and Accessibility Scanning module. Triages and resolves accessibility scan findings and brand voice violations, triggers external rescans, and ingests scanner callbacks.

System skill for the Technical SEO and Link Governance module. Triages and resolves technical SEO findings and broken link findings, submits redirect requests, and fetches external SEO data for context.

System skill for the Cadence and Outbound Outreach module. Runs multi-step outbound cadences over sales_cadences: enrolls prospects, advances cadence steps, places dialler calls, and routes intent-triggered starts. Mirrors the module's masters and lifecycle.

System skill for the Sales Email and Meeting Scheduling module. Drafts and sends tracked sales emails over sales_emails, drafts AI-assisted replies, and books prospect meetings. Mirrors the module's masters and lifecycle.

System skill for the Conversation Intelligence and Rep Coaching module. Captures call recordings, runs conversation analysis, publishes conversation insights, and surfaces coaching signals over call_recordings and conversation_intelligence_records. Mirrors the module's masters and lifecycle.
Operates HACCP plan authoring, critical control point setup, CCP monitoring, and deviation-to-incident workflows for the Hazard Analysis and CCP Monitoring module.
Operates allergen control, environmental monitoring, and sanitation workflows for the Allergen, Sanitation and Environmental Monitoring module.
Operates certification audit preparation, supplier risk scoring, supplier certification tracking, compliance obligations, and recall execution for the Certification Audit and Supplier Risk module.
Operates the animal-patient clinical record, vaccination protocols, lab-results review, and preventive-care recall outreach for the Clinical Care and Diagnostics module.
Operates the pet-owner client record, scheduling, and client communications for the Client Records, Scheduling and Billing module.
Operates the controlled-substance ledger and DEA-attributed dispensation workflow for the Drug Inventory and Controlled-Substance Ledger module.

System skill for the Content Repository and Capture module. Captures inbound unstructured content, manages metadata, folders, check-in / check-out, version history, and manual plus ML-assisted classification of content documents.

System skill for the Records Management and Information Governance module. Authors retention schedules, applies legal holds, drives defensible disposition at retention expiry, and maintains compliance audit trails over the content estate.
System skill for the Document Workflow Automation module. Routes content documents and their versions through review and approval workflows with auditable transitions.
